# Fixtures

Real player-response JSON and DOM/beacon event captures used by `classifier.test.ts`.

Populated in docs/ROADMAP.md §1.5 from the exports already collected in
`spike/exports/` (see `spike/RESULTS.md`). Empty for now — this directory exists so the
target layout from `CLAUDE.md` is in place before the detection engine (§1.2) lands.
